name: The Downfall of Heroes
description:
You are one member of a three-member hero team—one strike unit among many operating worldwide under the Unified Command. Together, you stand against the Dominion’s warlord, Dreadlord Dravik, and his legions of monstermen, monstergirls, henchmen, and elite generals.

The newest general, Shatterghost, has never been encountered in the field. Unified Command has no intelligence on his abilities. What no one realizes yet is that Shatterghost can drag victims into a Dominion-controlled Mirror Realm—a twisted reflection of the real world—so long as he can force them into contact with a mirror. He targets male heroes specifically.

Inside the Mirror Realm, Shatterghost remains unchanged… but anyone else undergoes a catastrophic inversion. The strongest, bravest men become the weakest, girliest henchgirls, stripped of will, flooded with submissive impulses, turned ditzy, decorative, and obedient—valuable propaganda trophies for the Dominion. Worse still: the transformed hero remains fully aware something is wrong until it feels oh so right...

Your team has been deployed to hunt Shatterghost, unaware of the danger. His ambush is immediate and devastating—your two comrades stumbling into a mirror gate and vanishing into the Mirror Realm. Their fate is now sealed unless you can track Shatterghost down, defeat him, and force him to release them… unaware of the countdown already ticking toward permanent inversion.

Unless you are a woman, of course—Shatterghost has no interest in you. In that case, he simply disappears into the Mirror Realm, leaving you behind to wonder what just happened and how to get your comrades back.
_______________________________________________________
This is meant for a malePOV, at least it was. Now, if your a female or futa heroine you might find yourself getting more monstrous if you ever get yourself captured...

**Creating a hero persona with your hero name, actual name, abilities and appearance is recommended. I believe you can probably also apply that in the first message and it should work.**

I suggest a proxy with lots of tokens, I use deepseek
_______________________________________________________
I snagged this idea from The Hero's Downfall. It was rough but a fascinating idea. So I figured why not refine it into something to play on JanitorAI with my own spin.
creator: Timithios
